untranslatable_reason: Not a sizing rule. This describes stop-loss placement methodology based on volatility (ATR), which is a risk management/stop-level rule, not a position sizing rule. Position sizing determines HOW MANY contracts/shares to buy; stop placement determines WHERE to exit. The signal establishes stop distance (1.0 × ATR from entry) but does not specify position quantity, capital allocation %, or any sizing multiplier.
